_comments.TICKS_PER_YEAR: 20 day/night cycles = 1 life year (800 ticks). 1 season = 5 days = 200 ticks.
_comments.ADULTHOOD_AGE: Agent becomes adult at 13, starts working and eligible for LLM cognition.
_comments.DEFAULT_MAX_AGE: Stone age realistic lifespan. ±10 variance → range 40-60.
_comments.ELDER_AGE_RATIO: Entity becomes elder at 75% of maxAge (~37 years).
_comments.BIRTH_COOLDOWN_YEARS: Minimum years between births for same couple. 4 years = 3200 ticks = 80 days.
